problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: The key to Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? is Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area — specifically Transcranial magnetic stimulation — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
